pre_game.message: Hey, I'm C – nice to meet you in this mix before the game kicks off. I'm really looking forward to it, as I'm hoping to win some extra cash for a dream trip; what about you?
Hey C, I'm I—nice to meet you too! I'm pumped for the game since I'm aiming to win some cash for my family and friends; that's awesome about your dream trip, where are you thinking of going?
Oh, awesome that you're playing for your loved ones—I'm eyeing a trip to Japan, something I've dreamed of for years; what's the first thing you'd do with the winnings if we pull it off?
Oh, Japan sounds incredible—I'd probably use the winnings to treat my family to a fun outing or help cover some expenses for them, just to see them smile!
That's so heartwarming, I; family means everything to me too—maybe we can both make it happen, what's one thing your family loves doing together?
That's sweet, C—my family loves going on weekend hikes and picnics to unwind; what about yours, any favorite family traditions?
That's great to hear about your hikes, I—my family tradition is gathering for holiday feasts where we share stories and play board games; it always brings us closer!
That sounds like such a warm tradition, C—board games are a blast in my family too, especially on rainy days; what's your go-to game during those feasts?

Oh, absolutely, our go-to game is Monopoly—it always turns into a hilarious showdown with lots of trash talk, but it makes the feasts even more memorable; what's your family's favorite one on those rainy days?
Oh, that's hilarious about Monopoly—our family's favorite on rainy days is Scrabble; it gets super competitive with all the wordplay and laughs, really brings out the fun!
Haha, Scrabble sounds like a blast with all that wordplay—maybe we can challenge each other after this game! It's been awesome talking with you, I.

Hi I, I'm C, and I have to say, this game has me buzzing with excitement—it's a chance to win some extra cash for things that matter to me. What's your take on all this, and what brought you here today?

Hey C, it's great to hear you're buzzing—I'm excited too, since I'm here to win some cash for my family and friends to make their lives a bit easier. What specifically are you hoping to do with your winnings?

Oh, that's wonderful you're aiming to help your family—I'm hoping to use my winnings for a dream holiday in Japan, like a perfect week of exploring and relaxing that I've always wanted; it's been great chatting with you, I!
That's fantastic about your Japan trip, C—I've loved our chat and wish you the best of luck in the game!
